title: UsefulCrafts
description: "UsefulCrafts" adds crafting recipes for several uncraftable items, making survival mode more convenient and enjoyable by allowing players to craft items like saddles, name tags, horse armor, and more.
body:
**UsefulCrafts** is a mod designed to enhance your Minecraft survival experience by adding crafting recipes for various items that previously had no recipes. Tired of endlessly searching through loot chests for rare items or relying on villagers? With UsefulCrafts, you can craft essential items like Saddles, Name Tags, and even the elusive Elytra!

This mod ensures that obtaining useful and rare items is no longer a matter of chance, but of skill and resource management. It maintains the balance of the game by assigning reasonable crafting costs for each item. If you're looking for a mod that simplifies some of the grind without feeling too overpowered, UsefulCrafts is for you!

#### Features:
**Crafting recipes** for hard-to-find items like:
  - Saddles
  - Name Tags
  - Horse Armor (Leather, Iron, Gold, Diamond)
  - Totem of Undying
  - Enchanted Golden Apple
  - Bell
  - Chainmail Armor
  - Trident
  - Elytra
- Compatible with both single-player and multiplayer.
  
#### Recipes
Here are the crafting recipes added in the mod:
